title: Dynamic management of public space
summary: Combining EO and positioning data supports agile, data-driven management of urban public spaces.
description:
Cities struggle to manage public space — on the ground and increasingly in the air — in an agile way that adapts to changing needs, events and disruptions. Static planning cannot respond to fast-changing requirements for transport, open space and maintenance.

Combining Copernicus land-cover and change data with Galileo/EGNOS positioning supports dynamic, data-driven management of public space. Replicable tools help cities reallocate space flexibly, respond to disruptive events and increase resilience.

site.integration_detail: Copernicus land-cover and change data combine with Galileo/EGNOS positioning and city data to manage public space. Copernicus is one layer in a dynamic, multi-source system.
